prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次分别为约25226→24528→19248→27919→36486名，2023年短暂冲高后2024年大幅回落，2025年继续后移8567名，近两年累计后移约 17238名，呈明显下行趋势；2025年基准约36486名；该校在河南省理科/物理类招生计划2021年53人、2022年52人、2023年51人、2024年70人、2025年81人，202 6年计划134人，较2025年大幅扩招65.4%，显著增加招生名额，对位次有推后作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名2021年第90名、2022年第95 名、2023年第104名、2024年第95名、2025年第98名、2026年第101名，近年排名在90–101区间波动，整体稳定；2023年高考周期内声誉评价为偏负面（师德师风 事件）；抖音综合热度排名第84位，评价为一般，短视频曝光量中等偏低；未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中安徽。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业为高热推荐，与该校物理类招生专业（计算机、电子、自动化等） 高度匹配，相关专业热度高可能吸引更多考生报考；河南省2026年普通高考总人数约120万（较2025年约90.7万大幅增加），按近年比例估算物理类约73.4万人，考生规模显著扩 大，竞争加剧；安徽大学位于安徽省合肥市，与河南省相邻，地域偏好较强，跨省报考热度较高。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次已大幅后移的趋势、2026年招生计划大幅扩招65.4%对位次的推后作用、以及河南省考生总数显著增加带来的竞争加剧 ，预计2026年物理类最低位次将继续后移；预测最低位次约51009名，区间50509–51509名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 25226 → 24528 → 19248 → 27919 → 36486. After a brief peak in 2023, there was a significant drop in 2024, and in 2025 it further shifted back by 8567 places, with a cumulative shift of about 17238 places over the past two years, showing a clear downward trend. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 36486. The enrollment plan for Henan Province in Science/Physics Category was 53 in 2021, 52 in 2022, 51 in 2023, 70 in 2024, 81 in 2025, and 134 in 2026, a substantial expansion of 65.4% compared to 2025, significantly increasing the number of admissions, which will push the ranking further back.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; Soft Science main ranking: 90th in 2021, 95th in 2022, 104th in 2023, 95th in 2024, 98th in 2025, 101st in 2026, fluctuating within the 90–101 range in recent years, overall stable. During the 2023 college entrance examination cycle, reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (teacher ethics incident). Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking: 84th, rated as average, with moderately low short video exposure. No obvious admission cutoff gaps recorded. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Anhui.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly recommended and highly match the university's Physics Category admission majors (Computer, Electronics, Automation, etc.). The high popularity of related majors may attract more applicants. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Henan Province general college entrance examination is about 1.2 million (significantly increased from about 907,000 in 2025). Estimated Physics Category candidates are about 734,000, with a significant expansion in candidate numbers, intensifying competition. Anhui University is located in Hefei City, Anhui Province, adjacent to Henan Province, with strong regional preference and high cross-province application enthusiasm.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant downward trend in rankings in 2025, the push-back effect of the 65.4% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the intensified competition due to the significant increase in the total number of candidates in Henan Province, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to shift back. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 51009, with a range of 50509–51509.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 50509–51509, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (e.g., within 50000), you can focus on competitive majors like Computer Science and Technology and Electronic Science and Technology. If your ranking is close to the upper bound of the range (e.g., around 51500), it is advisable to use Tier 3 majors as safety options to avoid slipping.
